title: Diamond Expansion
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dbaaa28213ca4b120658309a5509405a12e460d.png)In the game, Diamond has less content compared to other Ores. This mod aims to fill that gap.

**Here are recipes and features:**

* **Diamond Block Stairs**

![Stairs recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/c479d2c047de6e25f1c2b141729606c3e9bf7f5b.png)

* **Diamond Block Slab**

 ![Diamond Block Slab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/62c3c1291115c7bc28caf9d3c84666eca0d5f112.png)

 * **Diamond Block Walls**

 ![Diamond Block Wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/16d05d8e109b7d818d7e299b9a11e222fc32dfe9.png)

 * **Diamond Block Pillar**

 ![Diamond Block Wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/c32f4ca8faa43765483b2b45cf3d13ad8c3f11bd.png)

 * **Upgraded Glowstone**

 ![Upgraded Glowstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/b019d0ca78a4f155390a2b731d02ac969c611728.png)

 * **Diamond Apple** (Fills 3 Hunger bar - Strength II for 00:05 - Night Vision II for 03:00)

 ![Diamond Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/8733fe5a12a53cfd66174d8c71c15a83caf99ef9.png)

 * **Enchanted Diamond Apple** (Fills 4.5 Hunger bar - Strength II for 00:21 - Night Vision II for 03:19 - Speed II for 03:00)

 ![Enchanted Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/ea082d8da6e63ab27b8c1510a98faff01d600056.png)

 * **Diamond Carrot** (Fills 4.5 Hunger bar)

 ![Diamond Carrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/8ba4513e43c5e23c0c4d4a08f9deaab186cc44ab.png)

 * **Diamond Nugget**

 ![Diamond Nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/920844a87ea13d9fa5cf82650faf883d9b4ce9e6.png)

 * **Diamond Turtle Scute** (Gives Water Breathing II when user enters inside the water. Effect starts to count down from 00:25 when user exits from water)

 ![Diamond Turtle Scute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M5ocvnOZ/images/db9cc1d7eb46b71140776b5bd8f4b5ed7d542397.png)
